status.footer: {{count}} receiver(s) with active replication — refreshing every 5s

details.atLimitWarning: File count has reached the maximum. Older replication files may be pruned.
details.noAccess: No access to replication sequence data

filter.title: Replication Filter
filter.description: Control which receivers receive replicated data. Choose to replicate to all receivers, none, or a custom selection of workstations and groups.
filter.descAll: Replication data is sent to all connected receivers.
filter.descNone: Replication is disabled — no receivers will receive replicated data.
filter.descCustom: Replication data is sent to {{count}} selected recipient(s).
filter.noPermission: You do not have permission to edit the replication filter.

groups.title: Workstation Groups
groups.description: Manage groups of workstations for use in replication filters and other operations.
groups.deleteMessage: Delete group "{{name}}"? This will remove the group and its member list. Members themselves are not affected.
groups.noPermission: You do not have permission to edit workstation groups.

connectionCheck.title: Heads Retail Connection
connectionCheck.description: Test the connection to the Heads retail database used for replication.
